calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Reassignment from PJ Department for Court Trial.
Judge: Herbert Donalson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR.Lavon Granger.
Leonard P. Mastromonaco, Esq., for Plaintiff Dennis Aicardi,also present.
Defendant Nicolas Heldfond was not present.
Witness: Dennis Aicardi Sworn and Examined.
Exhibit 1- 3 Days Notice, Termination of lease and Proof of service, Identified and Admitted as evidence.
After hearing the evidence and witness testimony , the court rules in favor of Plaintiff as follows:
Possession of the premises located at 425 Greenwich St. San Francisco.
Back rent for April, May and June in the amount of $1,200.00 plus attorney fees and costs per costs bill.
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Counsel to prepare written Judgment.
Exhibits withdrawn on counsel stipulation.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Assigned To Trial Court
